subcodes.first_line: The river of mercy floweth, and the gate of grace standeth open, and the pavilion of bounty hath been raised; yet most among men are heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرات رحمت جاری و باب فضل مفتوح و سرادق عطا مرفوع ولکن اکثری از ناس از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
